When Ashe transforms, Frostbite target creature you don't control, and each other creature you don't control with toughness 3 or less, then draw a card.
Whenever Ashe attacks, frostbite the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls. [i](A creature with frostbite gets -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn.)[/i]
Creatures your opponents control with power 0 can't block.

cards.rules_text: Avalanche deals 2 damage to each creature.
When Avarosan Hearthguard enters, you get an emblem with “Creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter.”
When Avarosan Marksman enters, Avarosan Marksman deals 1 damage to any target.

Trample
When this creature enters, reveal the card on the top of your library, if it and this creature share their colours, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature, exile it, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. You may cast creatures exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled. Creatures cast from exile this way enter with an additional +1/+1 counter and a trample counter.
When Avarosan Sentry is destroyed, draw a card.
When Avarosan Trapper enters, create an Enraged Yeti token, then put three stun counters on it.
When Babbling Bjerg enters, search your library for a creature with power 5 or greater, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“They're tall as a mountain and covered in ice!” — Bjerg[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature you control gets +8/+4.
Put three +0/+1 counters on two target creatures you control.

Challenger, Juggernaut [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature. After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]
The first time Braum is dealt damage and is not destroyed, create a Mighty Poro token.
Whenever damage is dealt to Braum, put that many Heart counters on him. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Braum has ten or more Heart counters, remove all Heart counters from Braum, then transform him.
Partner

After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)[/i]
Whenever Braum is dealt damage and is not destroyed, create a Mighty Poro token.

cards.rules_text: Frostbite target creature an opponent controls with toughness 3 or less. [i](A creature with frostbite gets -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn.)[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]Avarosan folk tales speak of “Old Uncle Elnuk”, a stubborn old grouch who wanted nothing more than a warm patch of grass and an argument to dig his heel into.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature you control gets +0/+2 until end of turn.
Search your library for a legendary creature, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.

Trample
When Feral Mystic enters, if you are Enlightened, put four +1/+1 counters onto Feral Mystic. The first time you become Enlightened, put four +1/+1 counters onto Feral Mystic. [i](The first time you spend 10 or more mana in the same turn, you are Enlightened for the rest of the game.)[/i]
Frostbite target creature an opponent controls. [i](A creature with frostbite gets -X/-0 where X is that creatures power until the end of the turn.)[/i]

When Heart of the Fluft enters, mutate each other Poro creature you control under Heart of the Fluft.
Heart of the Fluft has +X/+Y where X is the total power of each creature mutated under Heart of the Fluft and Y is the total toughness of each creature mutated under Heart of the Fluft.

Enchant creature.
Enchanted creature you control gets +2/+2. Each other creature you control with the same name as the enchanted creature gets +2/+2.

When Lonely Poro enters reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three poro creatures with mana value 1, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Flying
When Omen Hawk enters, until the end of turn, the next two creatures you cast enter with an additional +1/+1 counter.
Each creature you control gets +2/+2 and Trample until the end of your next turn.

You get an emblem with “Poro creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter.”

Whenever Rimefang Wolf deals damage to a creature with power 0, destroy that creature at the end of the combat phase.

Challenger [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)[/i]
When Stalking Wolf enters, target opponent creates a Snow Hare token.

Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery, reveal the top card of your library. If the card revealed this way is a creature, exile it. You may cast creatures exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled. Creatures cast from exile this way enter with an additional +1/+1 counter.
Put three +1/+1 counters onto target creature you control that was dealt damage this turn.
If you control a yeti creature, create an Enraged Yeti token. If you don't, create an Enraged Yeti token, then put a stun counter on it.
When Tarkaz the Tribeless attacks, after blockers have been declared, Tarkaz the Tribeless deals 1 damage damage to each attacking and blocking creature.

Trample

When Troop of Elnuks enters, reveal the top 6 cards of your library, put all Elnuk creatures among them onto the battlefield, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

Trample
The first time Tryndamere would be destroyed, regenerate then transform Tryndamere instead. [i](The next time this creature would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it, remove all damage from it, and remove it from combat.)[/i]

When Zephyr Sage enters, reveal a card in your hand other than a creature named Zephyr Sage, create an exiled copy of the revealed card. You may cast that copy from exile for as long as it remains exiled.

At the end of any phase on your turn, if Yasuo has five or more Wind counters, remove all Wind counters from Yasuo, then transform him.
